operationName: South Africa: Cradle to Rainbow Nation
heroHeadline: South Africa: 2.5 Million Years at the Crossroads of History
heroSubtitle: From australopithecine fossils and Zulu kingdoms to apartheid, liberation, and GNU coalition governance — tracking the world's most complex democratic experiment.
footerNote: Data sourced from official South African government records, major outlets, TRC archives, academic institutions, and international organizations.
